Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_A}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{MS_{Factor_A}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{0.84}{45.62}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = {0.02}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_A\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_A}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_B}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{0.84}{{2164.97} - {231.27} - {838.06}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{0.84}{1095.64}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.0}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({1}, {24}) = {0.02}, p > {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.0}\) Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_B\) Summary Data for Factor_B  \(T_{B_1} = {518}  \quad n_{B_1} = {10}\)  \(T_{B_2} = {483}  \quad n_{B_2} = {10}\)  \(T_{B_3} = {450}  \quad n_{B_3} = {10}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2 = \mu_3\)  \(H_1:\) At least one mean is different  partition df for \(Factor_B\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = k_{Factor_B} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {3} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {2}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {5.61}, \alpha = {0.01}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_B\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_B}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_B}}^2}{n_{Factor_B}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{518}^2}{10} + \frac{{483}^2}{10} + \frac{{450}^2}{10}} - \frac{{1451}^2}{30}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{268324}}{10} + \frac{{233289}}{10} + \frac{{202500}}{10}} - \frac{{2105401}}{30}\) \(SS_{Factor_B} = {{26832.4} + {23328.9} + {20250.0}} - {70180.03}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {70411.3} - {70180.03}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {231.27}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_B}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{SS_{Factor_B}}{df_{Factor_B}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{231.27}{2}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = {115.64}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_B}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{MS_{Factor_B}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{115.64}{45.62}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = {2.53}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_B\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_B}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{231.27}{{2164.97} - {0.84} - {838.06}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{231.27}{1326.07}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.17}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({2}, {24}) = {2.53}, p > {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.17}\)  Stage 2 calculations for the \(AxB\) interaction   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0:\) There is no AxB interation  \(H_1:\) There is an AxB interaction  Partition df for the interaction  \(df_{AxB} = df_{Between} -df_{Factor_A} - df_{Factor_B}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {5} - {1} - {2}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {2}\)

Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_A\) Summary Data for Factor_A  \(T_{A_1} = {1205}  \quad n_{A_1} = {18}\)  \(T_{A_2} = {1215}  \quad n_{A_2} = {18}\)  \(T_{A_3} = {1073}  \quad n_{A_3} = {18}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2 = \mu_3\)  \(H_1:\) At least one mean is different  partition df for \(Factor_A\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = k_{Factor_A} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = {3} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = {2}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {3.19}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_A\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_A}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_A}}^2}{n_{Factor_A}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{1205}^2}{18} + \frac{{1215}^2}{18} + \frac{{1073}^2}{18}} - \frac{{3493}^2}{54}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{1452025}}{18} + \frac{{1476225}}{18} + \frac{{1151329}}{18}} - \frac{{12201049}}{54}\) \(SS_{Factor_A} = {{80668.06} + {82012.5} + {63962.72}} - {225945.35}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {226643.28} - {225945.35}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {697.93}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_A}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{SS_{Factor_A}}{df_{Factor_A}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{697.93}{2}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = {348.96}\)

Calculate the Sum of Squares: \(SS_{total}, SS_{within}, \text{ and } SS_{between}\)  \(SS_{total} = \Sigma X^2 - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{total} = {104398} - \frac{2818^2}{78}\)  \(SS_{total} = {104398} - \frac{7941124}{78}\)  \(SS_{total} = {104398} - {101809.28}\)  \(SS_{total} = {2588.72}\)  \(SS_{within} = \Sigma SS_{inside\_each\_condition}\)  \(SS_{within} = {147.23 + 126.31 + 51.08 + 154.92 + 162.77 + 201.23}\)  \(SS_{within} = {843.54}\)  \(SS_{between} = SS_{total} - SS_{within}\)  \(SS_{between} = {2588.72} - {843.54}\)  \(SS_{between} = {1745.18}\)  note: the other way to calculate \(SS_{betwen}\) is:  \(SS_{between} = \Sigma{\frac{T^2}{n}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)

Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_A}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{MS_{Factor_A}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{237.13}{11.72}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = {20.23}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_A\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_A}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_B}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{237.13}{{2588.72} - {515.1} - {992.95}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{237.13}{1080.67}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.22}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({1}, {72}) = {20.23}, p < {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.22}\) Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_B\) Summary Data for Factor_B  \(T_{B_1} = {1032}  \quad n_{B_1} = {26}\)  \(T_{B_2} = {877}  \quad n_{B_2} = {26}\)  \(T_{B_3} = {909}  \quad n_{B_3} = {26}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2 = \mu_3\)  \(H_1:\) At least one mean is different  partition df for \(Factor_B\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = k_{Factor_B} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {3} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {2}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {3.12}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_B\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_B}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_B}}^2}{n_{Factor_B}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{1032}^2}{26} + \frac{{877}^2}{26} + \frac{{909}^2}{26}} - \frac{{2818}^2}{78}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{1065024}}{26} + \frac{{769129}}{26} + \frac{{826281}}{26}} - \frac{{7941124}}{78}\) \(SS_{Factor_B} = {{40962.46} + {29581.88} + {31780.04}} - {101809.28}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {102324.38} - {101809.28}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {515.1}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_B}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{SS_{Factor_B}}{df_{Factor_B}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{515.1}{2}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = {257.55}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_B}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{MS_{Factor_B}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{257.55}{11.72}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = {21.98}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_B\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_B}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{515.1}{{2588.72} - {237.13} - {992.95}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{515.1}{1358.64}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.38}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({2}, {72}) = {21.98}, p < {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.38}\)  Stage 2 calculations for the \(AxB\) interaction   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0:\) There is no AxB interation  \(H_1:\) There is an AxB interaction  Partition df for the interaction  \(df_{AxB} = df_{Between} -df_{Factor_A} - df_{Factor_B}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {5} - {1} - {2}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {2}\) 
 The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {3.12}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(AxB\) Calculate \(SS_{AxB}\)  \(SS_{{AxB}} = SS_{{Between}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}\) \(SS_{AxB} = {1745.18} - {237.13} - {515.1}\)  \(SS_{AxB} = {992.95}\)  Mean Squares for \({AxB}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{SS_{AxB}}{df_{AxB}}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{992.95}{2}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = {496.48}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({AxB}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{MS_{AxB}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{496.48}{11.72}\)  \(F_{AxB} = {42.36}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{992.95}{{2588.72} - {237.13} - {515.1}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{992.95}{1836.49}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.54}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({2}, {72}) = {42.36}, p < {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.54}\)

Calculate the F-Ratio for \({AxB}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{MS_{AxB}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{290.18}{29.67}\)  \(F_{AxB} = {9.78}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{290.18}{{2082.8} - {355.12} - {250.58}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{290.18}{1477.1}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.2}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({1}, {40}) = {9.78}, p < {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.2}\)

Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_A}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{MS_{Factor_A}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{55.84}{69.98}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = {0.8}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_A\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_A}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_B}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{55.84}{{10891.18} - {2336.11} - {3460.92}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{55.84}{5094.15}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.01}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({1}, {72}) = {0.8}, p > {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.01}\) Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_B\) Summary Data for Factor_B  \(T_{B_1} = {1232}  \quad n_{B_1} = {26}\)  \(T_{B_2} = {1520}  \quad n_{B_2} = {26}\)  \(T_{B_3} = {1546}  \quad n_{B_3} = {26}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2 = \mu_3\)  \(H_1:\) At least one mean is different  partition df for \(Factor_B\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = k_{Factor_B} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {3} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {2}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {3.12}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_B\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_B}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_B}}^2}{n_{Factor_B}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{1232}^2}{26} + \frac{{1520}^2}{26} + \frac{{1546}^2}{26}} - \frac{{4298}^2}{78}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{1517824}}{26} + \frac{{2310400}}{26} + \frac{{2390116}}{26}} - \frac{{18472804}}{78}\) \(SS_{Factor_B} = {{58377.85} + {88861.54} + {91927.54}} - {236830.82}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {239166.93} - {236830.82}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {2336.11}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_B}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{SS_{Factor_B}}{df_{Factor_B}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{2336.11}{2}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = {1168.06}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_B}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{MS_{Factor_B}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{1168.06}{69.98}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = {16.69}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_B\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_B}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{2336.11}{{10891.18} - {55.84} - {3460.92}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{2336.11}{7374.42}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.32}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({2}, {72}) = {16.69}, p < {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.32}\)  Stage 2 calculations for the \(AxB\) interaction   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0:\) There is no AxB interation  \(H_1:\) There is an AxB interaction  Partition df for the interaction  \(df_{AxB} = df_{Between} -df_{Factor_A} - df_{Factor_B}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {5} - {1} - {2}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {2}\) 
 The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {3.12}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(AxB\) Calculate \(SS_{AxB}\)  \(SS_{{AxB}} = SS_{{Between}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}\) \(SS_{AxB} = {5852.87} - {55.84} - {2336.11}\)  \(SS_{AxB} = {3460.92}\)  Mean Squares for \({AxB}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{SS_{AxB}}{df_{AxB}}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{3460.92}{2}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = {1730.46}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({AxB}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{MS_{AxB}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{1730.46}{69.98}\)  \(F_{AxB} = {24.73}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{3460.92}{{10891.18} - {55.84} - {2336.11}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{3460.92}{8499.23}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.41}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({2}, {72}) = {24.73}, p < {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.41}\)

title: Two-Factor ANOVA

Given the following data, use a use a 2-Factor ANOVA with \(\alpha = {0.05}\) to analyze the following data  Full Group Summary Data  \(T_{A1B1} = {547} \quad M_{A1B1} = {60.78}\quad SS_{A1B1} = {503.56} \quad n_{A1B1} = {9}\)  \(T_{A1B2} = {618} \quad M_{A1B2} = {68.67}\quad SS_{A1B2} = {334.0} \quad n_{A1B2} = {9}\)  \(T_{A2B1} = {461} \quad M_{A2B1} = {51.22}\quad SS_{A2B1} = {633.56} \quad n_{A2B1} = {9}\)  \(T_{A2B2} = {447} \quad M_{A2B2} = {49.67}\quad SS_{A2B2} = {724.0} \quad n_{A2B2} = {9}\)   Stage 1 ANOVA Calculations  Calculate the Degrees of Freedom: \(df_{total}, df_{within}, \text{ and } df_{between}\)  \(df_{total} = N - 1\)  \(df_{total} = {36} - 1\)  \(df_{total} = {35}\)  \(df_{between} = k - 1\)  \(df_{between} = {4} - 1\)  \(df_{between} = {3}\)  \(df_{within} = N - K\)  \(df_{within} = {36} - {4}\)  \(df_{within} = {32}\) 
Calculate the Sum of Squares: \(SS_{total}, SS_{within}, \text{ and } SS_{between}\)  \(SS_{total} = \Sigma X^2 - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{total} = {123691} - \frac{2073^2}{36}\)  \(SS_{total} = {123691} - \frac{4297329}{36}\)  \(SS_{total} = {123691} - {119370.25}\)  \(SS_{total} = {4320.75}\)  \(SS_{within} = \Sigma SS_{inside\_each\_condition}\)  \(SS_{within} = {503.56 + 334.0 + 633.56 + 724.0}\)  \(SS_{within} = {2195.12}\)  \(SS_{between} = SS_{total} - SS_{within}\)  \(SS_{between} = {4320.75} - {2195.12}\)  \(SS_{between} = {2125.63}\)  note: the other way to calculate \(SS_{betwen}\) is:  \(SS_{between} = \Sigma{\frac{T^2}{n}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)

Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_A}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{MS_{Factor_A}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{1834.7}{68.6}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = {26.74}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_A\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_A}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_B}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{1834.7}{{4320.75} - {90.25} - {200.68}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{1834.7}{4029.82}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.46}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({1}, {32}) = {26.74}, p < {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.46}\) Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_B\) Summary Data for Factor_B  \(T_{B_1} = {1008}  \quad n_{B_1} = {18}\)  \(T_{B_2} = {1065}  \quad n_{B_2} = {18}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2\)  \(H_1: \mu_1 \ne \mu_2\)  partition df for \(Factor_B\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = k_{Factor_B} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {2} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {1}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {4.15}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_B\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_B}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_B}}^2}{n_{Factor_B}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{1008}^2}{18} + \frac{{1065}^2}{18}} - \frac{{2073}^2}{36}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{1016064}}{18} + \frac{{1134225}}{18}} - \frac{{4297329}}{36}\) \(SS_{Factor_B} = {{56448.0} + {63012.5}} - {119370.25}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {119460.5} - {119370.25}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {90.25}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_B}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{SS_{Factor_B}}{df_{Factor_B}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{90.25}{1}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = {90.25}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_B}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{MS_{Factor_B}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{90.25}{68.6}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = {1.32}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_B\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_B}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{90.25}{{4320.75} - {1834.7} - {200.68}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{90.25}{2285.37}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.04}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({1}, {32}) = {1.32}, p > {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.04}\)  Stage 2 calculations for the \(AxB\) interaction   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0:\) There is no AxB interation  \(H_1:\) There is an AxB interaction  Partition df for the interaction  \(df_{AxB} = df_{Between} -df_{Factor_A} - df_{Factor_B}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {3} - {1} - {1}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {1}\) 
 The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {4.15}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(AxB\) Calculate \(SS_{AxB}\)  \(SS_{{AxB}} = SS_{{Between}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}\) \(SS_{AxB} = {2125.63} - {1834.7} - {90.25}\)  \(SS_{AxB} = {200.68}\)  Mean Squares for \({AxB}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{SS_{AxB}}{df_{AxB}}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{200.68}{1}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = {200.68}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({AxB}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{MS_{AxB}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{200.68}{68.6}\)  \(F_{AxB} = {2.93}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{200.68}{{4320.75} - {1834.7} - {90.25}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{200.68}{2395.8}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.08}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({1}, {32}) = {2.93}, p > {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.08}\)

Calculate the Sum of Squares: \(SS_{total}, SS_{within}, \text{ and } SS_{between}\)  \(SS_{total} = \Sigma X^2 - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{total} = {57925} - \frac{1433^2}{36}\)  \(SS_{total} = {57925} - \frac{2053489}{36}\)  \(SS_{total} = {57925} - {57041.36}\)  \(SS_{total} = {883.64}\)  \(SS_{within} = \Sigma SS_{inside\_each\_condition}\)  \(SS_{within} = {34.0 + 72.0 + 17.5 + 89.33 + 41.33 + 113.33}\)  \(SS_{within} = {367.49}\)  \(SS_{between} = SS_{total} - SS_{within}\)  \(SS_{between} = {883.64} - {367.49}\)  \(SS_{between} = {516.15}\)  note: the other way to calculate \(SS_{betwen}\) is:  \(SS_{between} = \Sigma{\frac{T^2}{n}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)

Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_A}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{MS_{Factor_A}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{66.7}{12.25}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = {5.44}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_A\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_A}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_B}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{66.7}{{883.64} - {38.38} - {411.07}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{66.7}{434.19}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.15}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({1}, {30}) = {5.44}, p > {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.15}\) Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_B\) Summary Data for Factor_B  \(T_{B_1} = {464}  \quad n_{B_1} = {12}\)  \(T_{B_2} = {494}  \quad n_{B_2} = {12}\)  \(T_{B_3} = {475}  \quad n_{B_3} = {12}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2 = \mu_3\)  \(H_1:\) At least one mean is different  partition df for \(Factor_B\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = k_{Factor_B} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {3} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {2}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {5.39}, \alpha = {0.01}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_B\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_B}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_B}}^2}{n_{Factor_B}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{464}^2}{12} + \frac{{494}^2}{12} + \frac{{475}^2}{12}} - \frac{{1433}^2}{36}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{215296}}{12} + \frac{{244036}}{12} + \frac{{225625}}{12}} - \frac{{2053489}}{36}\) \(SS_{Factor_B} = {{17941.33} + {20336.33} + {18802.08}} - {57041.36}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {57079.74} - {57041.36}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {38.38}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_B}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{SS_{Factor_B}}{df_{Factor_B}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{38.38}{2}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = {19.19}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_B}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{MS_{Factor_B}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{19.19}{12.25}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = {1.57}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_B\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_B}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{38.38}{{883.64} - {66.7} - {411.07}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{38.38}{405.87}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.09}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({2}, {30}) = {1.57}, p > {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.09}\)  Stage 2 calculations for the \(AxB\) interaction   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0:\) There is no AxB interation  \(H_1:\) There is an AxB interaction  Partition df for the interaction  \(df_{AxB} = df_{Between} -df_{Factor_A} - df_{Factor_B}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {5} - {1} - {2}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {2}\) 
 The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {5.39}, \alpha = {0.01}\)  Partition the SS for \(AxB\) Calculate \(SS_{AxB}\)  \(SS_{{AxB}} = SS_{{Between}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}\) \(SS_{AxB} = {516.15} - {66.7} - {38.38}\)  \(SS_{AxB} = {411.07}\)  Mean Squares for \({AxB}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{SS_{AxB}}{df_{AxB}}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{411.07}{2}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = {205.54}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({AxB}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{MS_{AxB}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{205.54}{12.25}\)  \(F_{AxB} = {16.78}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{411.07}{{883.64} - {66.7} - {38.38}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{411.07}{778.56}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.53}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({2}, {30}) = {16.78}, p < {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.53}\)

text:
Problem 24

Calculate the Sum of Squares: \(SS_{total}, SS_{within}, \text{ and } SS_{between}\)  \(SS_{total} = \Sigma X^2 - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{total} = {31765} - \frac{987^2}{32}\)  \(SS_{total} = {31765} - \frac{974169}{32}\)  \(SS_{total} = {31765} - {30442.78}\)  \(SS_{total} = {1322.22}\)  \(SS_{within} = \Sigma SS_{inside\_each\_condition}\)  \(SS_{within} = {63.88 + 49.5 + 28.88 + 49.88}\)  \(SS_{within} = {192.14}\)  \(SS_{between} = SS_{total} - SS_{within}\)  \(SS_{between} = {1322.22} - {192.14}\)  \(SS_{between} = {1130.08}\)  note: the other way to calculate \(SS_{betwen}\) is:  \(SS_{between} = \Sigma{\frac{T^2}{n}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\) 
Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_A\) Summary Data for Factor_A  \(T_{A_1} = {399}  \quad n_{A_1} = {16}\)  \(T_{A_2} = {588}  \quad n_{A_2} = {16}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2\)  \(H_1: \mu_1 \ne \mu_2\)  partition df for \(Factor_A\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = k_{Factor_A} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = {2} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = {1}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {7.64}, \alpha = {0.01}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_A\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_A}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_A}}^2}{n_{Factor_A}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{399}^2}{16} + \frac{{588}^2}{16}} - \frac{{987}^2}{32}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{159201}}{16} + \frac{{345744}}{16}} - \frac{{974169}}{32}\) \(SS_{Factor_A} = {{9950.06} + {21609.0}} - {30442.78}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {31559.06} - {30442.78}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {1116.28}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_A}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{SS_{Factor_A}}{df_{Factor_A}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{1116.28}{1}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = {1116.28}\)

Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_B}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{MS_{Factor_B}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{11.28}{6.86}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = {1.64}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_B\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_B}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{11.28}{{1322.22} - {1116.28} - {2.52}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{11.28}{203.42}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.06}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({1}, {28}) = {1.64}, p > {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.06}\)  Stage 2 calculations for the \(AxB\) interaction   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0:\) There is no AxB interation  \(H_1:\) There is an AxB interaction  Partition df for the interaction  \(df_{AxB} = df_{Between} -df_{Factor_A} - df_{Factor_B}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {3} - {1} - {1}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {1}\) 
 The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {7.64}, \alpha = {0.01}\)  Partition the SS for \(AxB\) Calculate \(SS_{AxB}\)  \(SS_{{AxB}} = SS_{{Between}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}\) \(SS_{AxB} = {1130.08} - {1116.28} - {11.28}\)  \(SS_{AxB} = {2.52}\)  Mean Squares for \({AxB}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{SS_{AxB}}{df_{AxB}}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{2.52}{1}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = {2.52}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({AxB}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{MS_{AxB}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{2.52}{6.86}\)  \(F_{AxB} = {0.37}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{2.52}{{1322.22} - {1116.28} - {11.28}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{2.52}{194.66}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.01}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({1}, {28}) = {0.37}, p > {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.01}\)

Calculate the F-Ratio for \({AxB}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{MS_{AxB}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{112.67}{4.11}\)  \(F_{AxB} = {27.41}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{225.34}{{622.72} - {70.2} - {31.18}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{225.34}{521.34}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.43}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({2}, {72}) = {27.41}, p < {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.43}\)

 The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {4.89}, \alpha = {0.01}\)  Partition the SS for \(AxB\) Calculate \(SS_{AxB}\)  \(SS_{{AxB}} = SS_{{Between}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}\) \(SS_{AxB} = {1760.78} - {0.02} - {612.09}\)  \(SS_{AxB} = {1148.67}\)  Mean Squares for \({AxB}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{SS_{AxB}}{df_{AxB}}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{1148.67}{2}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = {574.34}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({AxB}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{MS_{AxB}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{574.34}{63.68}\)  \(F_{AxB} = {9.02}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{1148.67}{{6727.56} - {0.02} - {612.09}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{1148.67}{6115.45}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.19}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({2}, {78}) = {9.02}, p < {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.19}\)

title: Two-Factor ANOVA

Calculate the Sum of Squares: \(SS_{total}, SS_{within}, \text{ and } SS_{between}\)  \(SS_{total} = \Sigma X^2 - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{total} = {13805} - \frac{521^2}{20}\)  \(SS_{total} = {13805} - \frac{271441}{20}\)  \(SS_{total} = {13805} - {13572.05}\)  \(SS_{total} = {232.95}\)  \(SS_{within} = \Sigma SS_{inside\_each\_condition}\)  \(SS_{within} = {10.0 + 36.8 + 15.2 + 68.8}\)  \(SS_{within} = {130.8}\)  \(SS_{between} = SS_{total} - SS_{within}\)  \(SS_{between} = {232.95} - {130.8}\)  \(SS_{between} = {102.15}\)  note: the other way to calculate \(SS_{betwen}\) is:  \(SS_{between} = \Sigma{\frac{T^2}{n}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)

Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_A}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{MS_{Factor_A}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{26.45}{8.18}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = {3.23}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_A\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_A}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_B}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{26.45}{{232.95} - {61.25} - {14.45}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{26.45}{157.25}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.17}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({1}, {16}) = {3.23}, p > {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.17}\) Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_B\) Summary Data for Factor_B  \(T_{B_1} = {243}  \quad n_{B_1} = {10}\)  \(T_{B_2} = {278}  \quad n_{B_2} = {10}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2\)  \(H_1: \mu_1 \ne \mu_2\)  partition df for \(Factor_B\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = k_{Factor_B} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {2} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {1}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {4.49}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_B\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_B}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_B}}^2}{n_{Factor_B}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{243}^2}{10} + \frac{{278}^2}{10}} - \frac{{521}^2}{20}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{59049}}{10} + \frac{{77284}}{10}} - \frac{{271441}}{20}\) \(SS_{Factor_B} = {{5904.9} + {7728.4}} - {13572.05}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {13633.3} - {13572.05}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {61.25}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_B}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{SS_{Factor_B}}{df_{Factor_B}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{61.25}{1}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = {61.25}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_B}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{MS_{Factor_B}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{61.25}{8.18}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = {7.49}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_B\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_B}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{61.25}{{232.95} - {26.45} - {14.45}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{61.25}{192.05}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.32}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({1}, {16}) = {7.49}, p < {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.32}\)  Stage 2 calculations for the \(AxB\) interaction   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0:\) There is no AxB interation  \(H_1:\) There is an AxB interaction  Partition df for the interaction  \(df_{AxB} = df_{Between} -df_{Factor_A} - df_{Factor_B}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {3} - {1} - {1}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {1}\) 
 The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {4.49}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(AxB\) Calculate \(SS_{AxB}\)  \(SS_{{AxB}} = SS_{{Between}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}\) \(SS_{AxB} = {102.15} - {26.45} - {61.25}\)  \(SS_{AxB} = {14.45}\)  Mean Squares for \({AxB}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{SS_{AxB}}{df_{AxB}}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{14.45}{1}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = {14.45}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({AxB}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{MS_{AxB}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{14.45}{8.18}\)  \(F_{AxB} = {1.77}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{14.45}{{232.95} - {26.45} - {61.25}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{14.45}{145.25}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.1}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({1}, {16}) = {1.77}, p > {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.1}\)

Calculate the Sum of Squares: \(SS_{total}, SS_{within}, \text{ and } SS_{between}\)  \(SS_{total} = \Sigma X^2 - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{total} = {137292} - \frac{2710^2}{56}\)  \(SS_{total} = {137292} - \frac{7344100}{56}\)  \(SS_{total} = {137292} - {131144.64}\)  \(SS_{total} = {6147.36}\)  \(SS_{within} = \Sigma SS_{inside\_each\_condition}\)  \(SS_{within} = {1132.36 + 1347.43 + 1039.21 + 1509.43}\)  \(SS_{within} = {5028.43}\)  \(SS_{between} = SS_{total} - SS_{within}\)  \(SS_{between} = {6147.36} - {5028.43}\)  \(SS_{between} = {1118.93}\)  note: the other way to calculate \(SS_{betwen}\) is:  \(SS_{between} = \Sigma{\frac{T^2}{n}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)

 The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {7.15}, \alpha = {0.01}\)  Partition the SS for \(AxB\) Calculate \(SS_{AxB}\)  \(SS_{{AxB}} = SS_{{Between}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}\) \(SS_{AxB} = {1118.93} - {114.29} - {108.65}\)  \(SS_{AxB} = {895.99}\)  Mean Squares for \({AxB}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{SS_{AxB}}{df_{AxB}}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{895.99}{1}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = {895.99}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({AxB}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{MS_{AxB}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{895.99}{96.7}\)  \(F_{AxB} = {9.27}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{895.99}{{6147.36} - {114.29} - {108.65}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{895.99}{5924.42}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.15}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({1}, {52}) = {9.27}, p < {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.15}\)

Calculate the Sum of Squares: \(SS_{total}, SS_{within}, \text{ and } SS_{between}\)  \(SS_{total} = \Sigma X^2 - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{total} = {124762} - \frac{2284^2}{44}\)  \(SS_{total} = {124762} - \frac{5216656}{44}\)  \(SS_{total} = {124762} - {118560.36}\)  \(SS_{total} = {6201.64}\)  \(SS_{within} = \Sigma SS_{inside\_each\_condition}\)  \(SS_{within} = {1074.18 + 773.64 + 540.55 + 1178.73}\)  \(SS_{within} = {3567.1}\)  \(SS_{between} = SS_{total} - SS_{within}\)  \(SS_{between} = {6201.64} - {3567.1}\)  \(SS_{between} = {2634.54}\)  note: the other way to calculate \(SS_{betwen}\) is:  \(SS_{between} = \Sigma{\frac{T^2}{n}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)

Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_A}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{MS_{Factor_A}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{497.83}{89.18}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = {5.58}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_A\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_A}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_B}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{497.83}{{6201.64} - {1991.28} - {145.43}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{497.83}{4064.93}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.12}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({1}, {40}) = {5.58}, p > {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.12}\) Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_B\) Summary Data for Factor_B  \(T_{B_1} = {994}  \quad n_{B_1} = {22}\)  \(T_{B_2} = {1290}  \quad n_{B_2} = {22}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2\)  \(H_1: \mu_1 \ne \mu_2\)  partition df for \(Factor_B\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = k_{Factor_B} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {2} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {1}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {7.31}, \alpha = {0.01}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_B\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_B}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_B}}^2}{n_{Factor_B}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{994}^2}{22} + \frac{{1290}^2}{22}} - \frac{{2284}^2}{44}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{988036}}{22} + \frac{{1664100}}{22}} - \frac{{5216656}}{44}\) \(SS_{Factor_B} = {{44910.73} + {75640.91}} - {118560.36}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {120551.64} - {118560.36}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {1991.28}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_B}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{SS_{Factor_B}}{df_{Factor_B}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{1991.28}{1}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = {1991.28}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_B}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{MS_{Factor_B}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{1991.28}{89.18}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = {22.33}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_B\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_B}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{1991.28}{{6201.64} - {497.83} - {145.43}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{1991.28}{5558.38}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.36}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({1}, {40}) = {22.33}, p < {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.36}\)  Stage 2 calculations for the \(AxB\) interaction   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0:\) There is no AxB interation  \(H_1:\) There is an AxB interaction  Partition df for the interaction  \(df_{AxB} = df_{Between} -df_{Factor_A} - df_{Factor_B}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {3} - {1} - {1}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {1}\) 
 The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {7.31}, \alpha = {0.01}\)  Partition the SS for \(AxB\) Calculate \(SS_{AxB}\)  \(SS_{{AxB}} = SS_{{Between}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}\) \(SS_{AxB} = {2634.54} - {497.83} - {1991.28}\)  \(SS_{AxB} = {145.43}\)  Mean Squares for \({AxB}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{SS_{AxB}}{df_{AxB}}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{145.43}{1}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = {145.43}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({AxB}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{MS_{AxB}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{145.43}{89.18}\)  \(F_{AxB} = {1.63}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{145.43}{{6201.64} - {497.83} - {1991.28}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{145.43}{3712.53}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.04}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({1}, {40}) = {1.63}, p > {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.04}\)

title: Two-Factor ANOVA
text:
Problem 30
Given the following data, use a use a 2-Factor ANOVA with \(\alpha = {0.05}\) to analyze the following data  Full Group Summary Data  \(T_{A1B1} = {226} \quad M_{A1B1} = {18.83}\quad SS_{A1B1} = {93.67} \quad n_{A1B1} = {12}\)  \(T_{A1B2} = {210} \quad M_{A1B2} = {17.5}\quad SS_{A1B2} = {355.0} \quad n_{A1B2} = {12}\)  \(T_{A2B1} = {269} \quad M_{A2B1} = {22.42}\quad SS_{A2B1} = {156.92} \quad n_{A2B1} = {12}\)  \(T_{A2B2} = {309} \quad M_{A2B2} = {25.75}\quad SS_{A2B2} = {712.25} \quad n_{A2B2} = {12}\)  \(T_{A3B1} = {279} \quad M_{A3B1} = {23.25}\quad SS_{A3B1} = {194.25} \quad n_{A3B1} = {12}\)  \(T_{A3B2} = {328} \quad M_{A3B2} = {27.33}\quad SS_{A3B2} = {222.67} \quad n_{A3B2} = {12}\)   Stage 1 ANOVA Calculations  Calculate the Degrees of Freedom: \(df_{total}, df_{within}, \text{ and } df_{between}\)  \(df_{total} = N - 1\)  \(df_{total} = {72} - 1\)  \(df_{total} = {71}\)  \(df_{between} = k - 1\)  \(df_{between} = {6} - 1\)  \(df_{between} = {5}\)  \(df_{within} = N - K\)  \(df_{within} = {72} - {6}\)  \(df_{within} = {66}\) 
Calculate the Sum of Squares: \(SS_{total}, SS_{within}, \text{ and } SS_{between}\)  \(SS_{total} = \Sigma X^2 - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{total} = {39105} - \frac{1621^2}{72}\)  \(SS_{total} = {39105} - \frac{2627641}{72}\)  \(SS_{total} = {39105} - {36495.01}\)  \(SS_{total} = {2609.99}\)  \(SS_{within} = \Sigma SS_{inside\_each\_condition}\)  \(SS_{within} = {93.67 + 355.0 + 156.92 + 712.25 + 194.25 + 222.67}\)  \(SS_{within} = {1734.76}\)  \(SS_{between} = SS_{total} - SS_{within}\)  \(SS_{between} = {2609.99} - {1734.76}\)  \(SS_{between} = {875.23}\)  note: the other way to calculate \(SS_{betwen}\) is:  \(SS_{between} = \Sigma{\frac{T^2}{n}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\) 
Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_A\) Summary Data for Factor_A  \(T_{A_1} = {436}  \quad n_{A_1} = {24}\)  \(T_{A_2} = {578}  \quad n_{A_2} = {24}\)  \(T_{A_3} = {607}  \quad n_{A_3} = {24}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2 = \mu_3\)  \(H_1:\) At least one mean is different  partition df for \(Factor_A\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = k_{Factor_A} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = {3} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_A} = {2}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {3.14}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_A\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_A}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_A}}^2}{n_{Factor_A}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{436}^2}{24} + \frac{{578}^2}{24} + \frac{{607}^2}{24}} - \frac{{1621}^2}{72}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{190096}}{24} + \frac{{334084}}{24} + \frac{{368449}}{24}} - \frac{{2627641}}{72}\) \(SS_{Factor_A} = {{7920.67} + {13920.17} + {15352.04}} - {36495.01}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {37192.88} - {36495.01}\)  \(SS_{Factor_A} = {697.87}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_A}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{SS_{Factor_A}}{df_{Factor_A}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{697.87}{2}\)  \(MS_{Factor_A} = {348.94}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_A}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{MS_{Factor_A}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = \frac{348.94}{26.28}\)  \(F_{Factor_A} = {13.28}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_A\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_A}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_B}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{697.87}{{2609.99} - {74.02} - {103.34}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{697.87}{2432.63}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.29}\) The results:  reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,  \(F({2}, {66}) = {13.28}, p < {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.29}\) Stage 2 calculations for \(Factor_B\) Summary Data for Factor_B  \(T_{B_1} = {774}  \quad n_{B_1} = {36}\)  \(T_{B_2} = {847}  \quad n_{B_2} = {36}\)   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2\)  \(H_1: \mu_1 \ne \mu_2\)  partition df for \(Factor_B\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = k_{Factor_B} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {2} - 1\)  \(df_{Factor_B} = {1}\)   The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {3.99}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(Factor_B\) Calculate \(SS_{Factor_B}\)  \(\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_B}}^2}{n_{Factor_B}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{774}^2}{36} + \frac{{847}^2}{36}} - \frac{{1621}^2}{72}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{599076}}{36} + \frac{{717409}}{36}} - \frac{{2627641}}{72}\) \(SS_{Factor_B} = {{16641.0} + {19928.03}} - {36495.01}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {36569.03} - {36495.01}\)  \(SS_{Factor_B} = {74.02}\)  Mean Squares for \({Factor_B}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{SS_{Factor_B}}{df_{Factor_B}}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{74.02}{1}\)  \(MS_{Factor_B} = {74.02}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({Factor_B}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{MS_{Factor_B}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = \frac{74.02}{26.28}\)  \(F_{Factor_B} = {2.82}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_B\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_B}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{74.02}{{2609.99} - {697.87} - {103.34}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{74.02}{1808.78}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.04}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({1}, {66}) = {2.82}, p > {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.04}\)  Stage 2 calculations for the \(AxB\) interaction   State the Hypotheses  \(H_0:\) There is no AxB interation  \(H_1:\) There is an AxB interaction  Partition df for the interaction  \(df_{AxB} = df_{Between} -df_{Factor_A} - df_{Factor_B}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {5} - {2} - {1}\)  \(df_{AxB} = {2}\) 
 The decision criteria:  \(F_{crit} = {3.14}, \alpha = {0.05}\)  Partition the SS for \(AxB\) Calculate \(SS_{AxB}\)  \(SS_{{AxB}} = SS_{{Between}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}\) \(SS_{AxB} = {875.23} - {697.87} - {74.02}\)  \(SS_{AxB} = {103.34}\)  Mean Squares for \({AxB}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{SS_{AxB}}{df_{AxB}}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = \frac{103.34}{2}\)  \(MS_{AxB} = {51.67}\)
Calculate the F-Ratio for \({AxB}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{MS_{AxB}}{MS_{Within}}\)  \(F_{AxB} = \frac{51.67}{26.28}\)  \(F_{AxB} = {1.97}\) 
 Calculate \(\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB\)  \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{103.34}{{2609.99} - {697.87} - {74.02}}\) \(\eta_p^2 = \frac{103.34}{1838.1}\) \(\eta_p^2 = {0.06}\) The results:  fail to reject the null hypothesis, results not significant,  \(F({2}, {66}) = {1.97}, p > {0.05}, \eta_p^2 = {0.06}\)
